role: Core type definitions and data contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system's data model, configuration, and infrastructure.
responsibility: Defines all shared interfaces and types enabling consistent data structures across mirror units (SpineUnit, SpineIdentity, etc.), project configuration (SpineConfig), language support, synchronization manifests, architectural rules, and version management.

children.role: TypeScript interface defining the central configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.

Core TypeScript type definitions module for the ArchSpine mirror system's data model, defining all interfaces and types for the complete mirror data structure including unit, identity, semantic, skeleton, graph, provenance, folder, and project representations.
Public API facade (barrel export) for the infrastructure subsystem, aggregating and re-exporting all infra-layer modules.
TypeScript type definition module defining the data contracts for language support metadata within the ArchSpine mirror system.
Core TypeScript module defining shared data transfer object (DTO) interfaces for the ArchSpine synchronization and manifest system.
TypeScript interface defining the canonical data structure for an ArchSpine rule document within the rule engine's domain model.
Centralized version definition module for ArchSpine schema and package versioning.
